---
description: "Implement and modify React frontend code, including components, hooks, routing, forms, shared state, API client integration, and styling. Use when building or changing client-side UI and behavior. Not for test-only work (use react-frontend-unit-tester), behavior-preserving refactors (use react-dotnet-refactor-specialist), or non-trivial architecture decisions (use react-dotnet-solution-architect)."
